decisions.rationale: Supabase now issues publishable keys (sb_publishable_*) for new projects
Tailwind v4 uses --spacing-{name} internally; custom tokens with same names override the scale silently
Guest users need to reach /auth/login to sign up; blocking them created a dead-end at /home

context_notes: All 6 plans executed. Two post-deploy bugs fixed: Tailwind v4 spacing token naming conflict and anonymous session routing. App boots and looks correct locally. Production deploy happened before bug fixes.
